news.title:
L&T shares enter bear market, down 22% from 52-week high; affected by Iran war.
Brokerages differ on L&T; Macquarie is overweight (target ₹4,910), UBS neutral (target ₹4,150).
news.summary:
L&T shares enter bear market, down 22% from 52-week high; affected by Iran war.
Brokerages differ on L&T; Macquarie is overweight (target ₹4,910), UBS neutral (target ₹4,150).

news.title:
Larsen & Toubro executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 35.5 crore.
The trade involved 97,695 shares at Rs. 3,633.00 per share.
news.summary:

news.title:
L&T transferred its industrial construction e-commerce business to SuFin Ltd.
The transfer, via slump sale for ₹42.9 Cr, was completed on March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
L&T transferred its industrial construction e-commerce business to SuFin Ltd.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy taps external contractors, including L&T, Sterling & Wilson, and KPI Green, for expansion.
Shares fell 3.1% to ₹806.8 on BSE; market capitalization at ₹1.33 trillion amid broader renewable stock pullback.

news.title:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.
news.summary:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Buy on L&T at Rs 3,588 and RIL near Rs 1,270-1,300; Hold for Canara Bank, MRPL, Piramal Pharma.
Avoid Shakti Pumps; Tata Motors, Vimta Labs advised as Wait and Watch; HBL Engineering Buy on declines; ITC Sell on rise.

Projects include a Float Glass Plant and a two-wheeler manufacturing facility, showcasing L&T's strong EPC capabilities.

news.title:
L&T bags orders worth Rs 1,000–2,500 cr for projects in Gujarat and Andhra Pradesh.
Q3 FY26 net profit fell 4.3% YoY to Rs 3,215.1 cr; shares dropped 1.9% to Rs 3,581 on BSE.
news.summary:
L&T bags orders worth Rs 1,000–2,500 cr for projects in Gujarat and Andhra Pradesh.

news.title:
Experts analyzed stocks: Jio Financial Services, IRCTC, L&T, Suzlon, Wipro, and Bajaj Auto on NDTV's 'Ask Profit'.
Buy: L&T, Suzlon; Hold: Jio Financial, IRCTC, Bajaj Auto; Avoid: Wipro. Analysts provided targets and stop-loss points.

news.title:

The project includes supplying water to South-East Guwahati with 5 years of operation & maintenance.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, L&T, and Fino Payments led Tuesday's market movers with significant action.
Indian indices rose sharply, driven by gains in banks, auto, and IT sectors.

news.title:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.
news.summary:
Nifty surged over 23,000; Sensex rose 1,681.7 pts as markets gained amid Iran-U.S. negotiation hopes.
InterGlobe Aviation, L&T, UltraTech Cement led gains; Coal India, Power Grid lagged; India VIX dropped 6.3%.

news.title:
The 2026 Iran war impacted Indian stocks, with L&T, IndiGo, and HPCL facing declines due to disrupted oil supply, trade routes, and investor outflows.
L&T lost 20% over Middle East exposure risks, IndiGo dropped 16% from flight cancellations and fuel costs, while HPCL fell 25% amid crude price spikes.
news.summary:
The 2026 Iran war impacted Indian stocks, with L&T, IndiGo, and HPCL facing declines due to disrupted oil supply, trade routes, and investor outflows.
L&T lost 20% over Middle East exposure risks, IndiGo dropped 16% from flight cancellations and fuel costs, while HPCL fell 25% amid crude price spikes.

news.title:
Larsen & Toubro plans collaboration with Chinese firms under new FDI rules for cost savings.
Focus sectors include solar energy, capital goods, and electronics under Press Note 3.
news.summary:

news.title:

5% sites stalled with minimal revenue impact; recent 22% stock correction offers attractive value.
